title: Flaky Syrian Lamb Skewers
description: A classic Syrian dish featuring tender lamb, crispy onions, and a hint of wine.
instructions: Soak 12-15 bamboo skewers in water for at least 30 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine lamb, onions, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, wine vinegar, salt, black pepper, and oregano.
Mix well to coat the lamb evenly.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the robata grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the lamb mixture onto the soaked skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to your liking.
Meanwhile, warm the chopped pita bread in the oven for 5-7 minutes.
Once the skewers are cooked, serve immediately with the warm pita bread.
Garnish with fresh parsley and a dollop of tzatziki sauce, if desired.
